title: Formulae automation is not working

posts.author: rorydouglas (rorydouglas)
posts.cookedHtml:
When creating an item - I have been trying to automatically populate a text column with the name of the group it was created in, but to no avail.

This technically works using the formula automation - See below

image1184×889 45.4 KB

I have tried putting the formula in speech marks but nothing happens. All of the other automation I have created on the board works - a lot of it happening when the item is created.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Rory,

To confirm, are you currently using the general caster app to achieve this?

posts.author: GiannisKoukounas (Giannis Koukounas)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @rorydouglas ,

Welcome to the monday community !

I assume you are using General Caster ( or Autoboost?). Seeing as this is an app issue, I would suggest contacting the app developers directly, I know they will help you resolve your issue quickly.

Best,
Giannis, Implementation Consultant at thespelas.com

posts.author: rorydouglas (rorydouglas)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi There!

I don’t think this is the general caster. See below

image1952×809 136 KB

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Rory,

Thanks for the screenshot

It looks like you’re using the formula in automations app.

Because this issue is specific to the app, we kindly ask that you reach out to the apps developer via snir@alayofdigital.com. You can find this email under the support section of the app in the apps marketplace!
